creator: erik@tenku.dk
text:
Created attachment 240454
Patch packaging of ROOT version 6.28/00 on arm64

ROOT version 6.28/00 fails to be packaged on arm64: https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/ampere2/data/main-arm64-default/p1b4f77b589d3_s357492c995/logs/root-6.28.00.log

This patch fixes the reported errors.
